For this analysis I'll be using only genes from the filtered table

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{data}\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read.delim}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"/home/josema/Downloads/DRIP/WITH TTN AAs/marten\_domain\_PS+complexity20240606\_filtered\_20240625.tsv"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{row.names=}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

I'll create a set of new columns to include age of domain pfam identifer

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{data\_age\_unified }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(domain\_accession) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Domain\_ID\_PS\_Age=}\FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(Domain\_PS\_Age, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =}\NormalTok{ T),}
         \AttributeTok{Domain\_ID\_PS=}\FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(Domain\_PS, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =}\NormalTok{ T),}
         \AttributeTok{Domain\_ID\_Era=}\FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =}\NormalTok{ T),}
         \AttributeTok{Domain\_ID\_Era\_Age=}\FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era\_Age, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =}\NormalTok{ T)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{ungroup}\NormalTok{() }
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{data\_age\_unified }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(domain\_accession) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Domain\_ID\_PS\_Age=}\FunctionTok{max}\NormalTok{(Domain\_PS\_Age, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =}\NormalTok{ T),}

    \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{aspect.ratio=}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{xlab}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Youngest domain length\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{ylab}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Oldest domain length\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_viridis\_c}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{guides}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fill=}\FunctionTok{guide\_colourbar}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Log10(Proteins)\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{))}\SpecialCharTok{+}
      \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{axis.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{angle =} \DecValTok{45}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{vjust=}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hjust=}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)) }
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

neural/non-neural}\label{intra-protein-diferences-neuralnon-neural}}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{table\_differences\_domain\_neural }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(Name, Neural, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{P{-}old}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{P{-}old/P+old}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{|P{-}old|}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{|P{-}old/P+old|}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{P{-}young}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{P{-}young/P+young}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{|P{-}young|}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{|P{-}young/P+young|}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{pivot\_longer}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(Name,Neural), }\AttributeTok{names\_to =} \StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Metric\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{values\_to =} \StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Difference\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{Metric=}\FunctionTok{factor}\NormalTok{(Metric, }\AttributeTok{levels=}\FunctionTok{c}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}P{-}old\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}P{-}old/P+old\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}|P{-}old|\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}|P{-}old/P+old|\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}P{-}young\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}P{-}young/P+young\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}|P{-}young|\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}|P{-}young/P+young|\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{)))}\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{( }\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x=}\NormalTok{Difference,  }\AttributeTok{fill=}\NormalTok{Neural))}\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{geom\_histogram}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{facet\_wrap}\NormalTok{(}\SpecialCharTok{\textasciitilde{}}\NormalTok{Metric, }\AttributeTok{scales =} \StringTok{\textquotesingle{}free\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{ncol =} \DecValTok{4}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_y\_log10}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{xlab}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Era\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{ylab}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Value\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  
    \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{axis.title.x=}\FunctionTok{element\_blank}\NormalTok{(),}
          \AttributeTok{axis.text.x=}\FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{angle =} \DecValTok{45}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{vjust =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{hjust =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{))}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{strip.background =} \FunctionTok{element\_rect}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{fill =} \ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{colour =} \ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{strip.text.x =} \FunctionTok{element\_text}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{size =} \DecValTok{10}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color =} \StringTok{"black"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{face =} \StringTok{"bold"}\NormalTok{),}
        \AttributeTok{legend.position=}\StringTok{"bottom"}
\NormalTok{        )}
\end{Highlighting}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{data}\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read.delim}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{"/home/josema/Downloads/DRIP/WITH TTN AAs/marten\_domain\_PS+complexity20240606\_original\_20240625.tsv"}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{row.names=}\DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}

\NormalTok{data\_coverage }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{select}\NormalTok{(  Name ,Plen ,  Pair\_Domain\_Unique\_ID ,}
\NormalTok{                          domain\_from\_ali\_query ,  domain\_to\_ali\_query, Era, Era\_Age\_MYA) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{filter}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{complete.cases}\NormalTok{(.))}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\CommentTok{\# Function to calculate domain coverage percentage}
\NormalTok{calculate\_domain\_coverage }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(df) \{}
  \CommentTok{\# Split data by Name}
\NormalTok{  genes }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{split}\NormalTok{(df, df}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Name)}
  
\NormalTok{  results }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{lapply}\NormalTok{(genes, }\ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(gene\_data) \{}
    \CommentTok{\# Create GRanges object for domains}
\NormalTok{    gr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GenomicRanges}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{GRanges}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{seqnames =} \FunctionTok{Rle}\NormalTok{(gene\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Name), }\CommentTok{\# Rle is required for seqnames}
      \AttributeTok{ranges =}\NormalTok{ IRanges}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{IRanges}\NormalTok{(}
        \AttributeTok{start =}\NormalTok{ gene\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{domain\_from\_ali\_query,}
        \AttributeTok{end =}\NormalTok{ gene\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{domain\_to\_ali\_query}
\NormalTok{      )}
\NormalTok{    )}
    
    \CommentTok{\# Reduce ranges to merge overlapping regions}
\NormalTok{    reduced\_gr }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ GenomicRanges}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{reduce}\NormalTok{(gr)}
    
    \CommentTok{\# Calculate total covered length}
\NormalTok{    total\_covered\_length }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{sum}\NormalTok{(IRanges}\SpecialCharTok{::}\FunctionTok{width}\NormalTok{(reduced\_gr))}
    
    \CommentTok{\# Extract gene length (assume consistent length for the gene)}
\NormalTok{    gene\_length }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(gene\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Plen)}
    
    \CommentTok{\# Extract unique Era (assume each gene has a single Era)}
\NormalTok{    Era }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(gene\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Era)}
    
    \CommentTok{\# Calculate percentage coverage}
\NormalTok{    percentage\_coverage }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ (total\_covered\_length }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ gene\_length) }\SpecialCharTok{*} \DecValTok{100}
    
    \CommentTok{\# Count domains}
\NormalTok{    domain\_count }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(gene\_data)}
    
    \CommentTok{\# Return the result as a data frame}
    \FunctionTok{data.frame}\NormalTok{(}
      \AttributeTok{Name =} \FunctionTok{unique}\NormalTok{(gene\_data}\SpecialCharTok{$}\NormalTok{Name),}
      \AttributeTok{Era =}\NormalTok{ Era,}
      \AttributeTok{TotalCoveredLength =}\NormalTok{ total\_covered\_length,}
      \AttributeTok{Plen =}\NormalTok{ gene\_length,}
      \AttributeTok{PercentageCoverage =}\NormalTok{ percentage\_coverage,}
      \AttributeTok{domain\_count =}\NormalTok{ domain\_count}
\NormalTok{    )}
\NormalTok{  \})}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Combine results into a single data frame}
  \FunctionTok{do.call}\NormalTok{(rbind, results)}
\NormalTok{\}}


\CommentTok{\# Calculate domain coverage}
\ControlFlowTok{if}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{file.exists}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}/home/josema/Desktop/domain\_coverage\_proteins.csv\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{))\{}
\NormalTok{         domain\_coverage }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{read.csv}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}/home/josema/Desktop/domain\_coverage\_proteins.csv\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}\ControlFlowTok{else}\NormalTok{\{}
\NormalTok{        domain\_coverage }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}} \FunctionTok{calculate\_domain\_coverage}\NormalTok{(data\_coverage)}
        \FunctionTok{write.csv}\NormalTok{(domain\_coverage,}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}/home/josema/Desktop/domain\_coverage\_proteins.csv\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{)}
\NormalTok{\}}
       
\CommentTok{\# Print the results}
\FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(domain\_coverage)}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}

  \FunctionTok{geom\_boxplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{y=}\NormalTok{domain\_count, }\AttributeTok{x=}\NormalTok{Era, }\AttributeTok{group=}\NormalTok{Era, }\AttributeTok{color=}\FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(Era),}\AttributeTok{fill=}\FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(Era)), }\AttributeTok{show.legend =}\NormalTok{ F)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_bw}\NormalTok{() }\SpecialCharTok{+}

  \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =}\NormalTok{ eras\_palette)}\SpecialCharTok{+}

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{data }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{distinct}\NormalTok{(Era, Era\_Age\_MYA) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{arrange}\NormalTok{(Era) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{duration=}\NormalTok{ Era\_Age\_MYA }\SpecialCharTok{{-}}\FunctionTok{lead}\NormalTok{(Era\_Age\_MYA) ) }

\begin{Shaded}
\begin{Highlighting}[]
\NormalTok{plot\_function }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}  \ControlFlowTok{function}\NormalTok{(dataset) \{ }
  
\NormalTok{  subtitle}\OtherTok{=} \FunctionTok{paste}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{deparse}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{substitute}\NormalTok{(dataset)),}\StringTok{"| N ="}\NormalTok{, }\FunctionTok{nrow}\NormalTok{(dataset) )}
  
  \CommentTok{\# Era}
\NormalTok{  p1 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dataset }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x=}\NormalTok{ Domain\_Era, }\AttributeTok{fill=}\FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era), }\AttributeTok{group=}\FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era)))}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_bar}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{show.legend =}\NormalTok{ F)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{aspect.ratio =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Era\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{subtitle =}\NormalTok{ subtitle)  }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =}\NormalTok{ eras\_palette)}

  
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(p1)}
  

  \CommentTok{\# Era}
\NormalTok{  p1}\FloatTok{.2} \OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dataset }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
    \FunctionTok{group\_by}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{summarise}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{occurrences =} \FunctionTok{n}\NormalTok{(), }
              \AttributeTok{Era\_age =} \FunctionTok{min}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era\_Age, }\AttributeTok{na.rm =} \ConstantTok{TRUE}\NormalTok{)) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%}
    \FunctionTok{mutate}\NormalTok{(}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{n/Age}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}} \OtherTok{=}\NormalTok{ occurrences }\SpecialCharTok{/}\NormalTok{ Era\_age) }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x=}\NormalTok{ Domain\_Era, }\AttributeTok{y=}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\AttributeTok{n/Age}\StringTok{\textasciigrave{}}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{fill=}\FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era), }\AttributeTok{group=}\FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era)))}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_col}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{show.legend =}\NormalTok{ F)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{aspect.ratio =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Era Normalized (N/Era Age)\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{subtitle =}\NormalTok{ subtitle)  }\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_fill\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =}\NormalTok{ eras\_palette)}

  
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(p1}\FloatTok{.2}\NormalTok{)}

  \CommentTok{\# PS}
\NormalTok{  p2 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dataset }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x=}\NormalTok{ Domain\_PS))}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_bar}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{aspect.ratio =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{\textquotesingle{}PS\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{subtitle =}\NormalTok{ subtitle)}
  
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(p2)}

  
  
  \CommentTok{\# Complexity}
  
\NormalTok{  p3 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dataset }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x=}\NormalTok{ Domain\_Era,}
             \AttributeTok{y=}\NormalTok{Domain\_Complexity,}
             \AttributeTok{group=}\FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era),}
             \AttributeTok{color=}\FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era)))}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_jitter}\NormalTok{( }\AttributeTok{alpha=}\FloatTok{0.4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{show.legend =}\NormalTok{ F)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_boxplot}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{show.legend =}\NormalTok{ F, }\AttributeTok{fill=}\ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color=}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}gray40\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{outliers =}\NormalTok{ F)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{aspect.ratio =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Complexity\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{subtitle =}\NormalTok{ subtitle)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =}\NormalTok{ eras\_palette)}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(p3)}

\CommentTok{\# Length}
  
\NormalTok{  p4 }\OtherTok{\textless{}{-}}\NormalTok{ dataset }\SpecialCharTok{\%\textgreater{}\%} 
  \FunctionTok{ggplot}\NormalTok{(}\FunctionTok{aes}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{x=}\NormalTok{ Domain\_Era,}
             \AttributeTok{y=}\NormalTok{domain\_plen,}
             \AttributeTok{group=}\FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era),}
             \AttributeTok{color=}\FunctionTok{as.factor}\NormalTok{(Domain\_Era)))}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_jitter}\NormalTok{( }\AttributeTok{alpha=}\FloatTok{0.4}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{show.legend =}\NormalTok{ F)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{geom\_boxplot}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{show.legend =}\NormalTok{ F, }\AttributeTok{fill=}\ConstantTok{NA}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{color=}\StringTok{\textquotesingle{}gray40\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{, }\AttributeTok{outliers =}\NormalTok{ F)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme\_classic}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{theme}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{aspect.ratio =} \DecValTok{1}\NormalTok{)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{labs}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{title =} \StringTok{\textquotesingle{}Length\textquotesingle{}}\NormalTok{,}
       \AttributeTok{subtitle =}\NormalTok{ subtitle)}\SpecialCharTok{+}
    \FunctionTok{scale\_y\_log10}\NormalTok{()}\SpecialCharTok{+}
  \FunctionTok{scale\_color\_manual}\NormalTok{(}\AttributeTok{values =}\NormalTok{ eras\_palette)}
  \FunctionTok{print}\NormalTok{(p4)}
  
\NormalTok{\}}
\end{Highlighting}
\end{Shaded}
